title: Partial real-world analogue of: Viral hostage demand forces televised political humiliation
thesis_statement: Partial systems exist that approximate aspects of this thesis without full episode fidelity: Networked social media and always-on news can coerce a head of state into a live televised degrading act under hostage threat, with fabricated footage failing under scrutiny.
ai_role: Deepfake generation, virality prediction, automated news amplification, synthetic media detection (failure mode).
